channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: St. Pete City Council to vote on Rays stadium bonds
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (WFLA) - The discussion on whether or not to keep the Rays in St. Petersburg continues as the St. Pete City Council is expected to vote Thursday afternoon on the bonds that would fund a portion of the stadium and the redevelopment of the Gas Plant District.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: George Russell accuses Max Verstappen of bullying and threatening behavior as F1 feud deepens
item.description: Mercedes driver George Russell has accused Formula 1 champion Max Verstappen of bullying and threatening behavior as a dispute between the two at last week’s race in Qatar deepened.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Riley Gaines holds ceremony for girls volleyball players who refused to play trans opponent
item.description: Riley Gaines held a ceremony for the Stone Ridge Christian High School girls volleyball team weeks after forfeiting a playoff game that would have featured a trans athlete.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Flagg leads the way as No. 9 Duke holds off Broome and No. 2 Auburn for an 84-78 win
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Freshman sensation Cooper Flagg had 22 points and 11 rebounds to help No. 9 Duke push past No. 2 Auburn 84-78 on Wednesday night in the SEC/ACC Challenge.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Promise kept: Oregon State-bound Ellijah Washington makes Oakland public school proud
item.description: 2024 CFB early signing: Oregon State commit Ellijah Washington spent all four years of high school at Castlemont in Oakland
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Unranked Creighton knocks off No. 1 Kansas behind Pop Isaacs' season-high 27 points
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — Pop Isaacs helped unranked Creighton upset No. 1 Kansas 76-63 on Wednesday night, scoring a season-high 27 points and matching his career high with six 3-pointers.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Celtics withstand 3-point spree to beat the Pistons 130-120
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Jaylen Brown had 28 points with nine assists and Kristaps Porzingis added 26 points and nine rebounds to lead the Boston Celtics to their ninth victory in 10 games, a 130-120 victory over the Detroit Pistons on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: McNeeley scores 17 points as No. 25 UConn rallies to a 76-72 win over No. 15 Baylor
item.description: STORRS, Conn. (AP) — Liam McNeeley scored 17 points and No. 25 UConn came back from an early deficit to beat No. 15 Baylor 76-72 on Wednesday night in the Big 12-Big East Battle.
item.dc:creator: JIM FULLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: League upholds 3-game suspension for Houston LB Azeez Al-Shaair following hit on Trevor Lawrence
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NFL and the NFL players association upheld Houston linebacker Azeez Al-Shaair's three-game suspension without pay for repeated violations of player safety rules following his violent hit to the head of Jacksonville’s Trevor Lawrence, who sustained a concussion and is now on injur
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 76ers coach Nick Nurse says no plans to shut down oft-injured center Joel Embiid
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid's endless injury updates read like this for the week — he sat out Wednesday night against Orlando, there's a chance he could play Friday against the Magic and, no, the 76ers haven't yet considered shutting own the All-Star center.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LiAngelo Ball recalls being arrested in China for shoplifting sunglasses from Louis Vuitton store
item.description: Former NBA player LiAngelo Ball recalled a time he and two other UCLA teammates stole sunglasses in China during an episode of “Unapologetically Angel.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Liverpool's lead cut in Premier League and Man City ends slump. Chelsea and Arsenal win
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Liverpool’s lead at the top of the Premier League was cut to seven points after a thrilling 3-3 draw with Newcastle on Wednesday. Chelsea moved up to second by thrashing last-place Southampton 5-1, while Arsenal is third after a 2-0 win over Manchester United.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jaguars coach Doug Pederson defends his team's reaction to illegal hit on QB Trevor Lawrence
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Jacksonville Jaguars coach Doug Pederson has no problem with how his team reacted to the illegal hit on quarterback Trevor Lawrence, who was placed on injured reserve.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pro Picks: Falcons will upset the Vikings in Kirk Cousins' return to Minnesota
item.description: Pro Picks is a weekly column where AP Pro Football Writer Rob Maaddi shares his picks for upcoming games. For all previous Pro Picks, head here. ___ Six division matchups and Kirk Cousins’ return to Minnesota highlight a lighter Week 14 schedule.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LPGA and USGA to require players to be assigned female at birth or transition before male puberty
item.description: Players must be assigned female at birth or have transitioned to female before going through male puberty to compete in LPGA tournaments or the eight USGA championships for females under new gender policies published Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SEC and Big Ten powers lead the way on signing day as prospects finalize their college selections
item.description: Georgia, Texas, Alabama, Oregon and Ohio State are bringing in the nation's top recruiting class as high school prospects across the country finalize their college plans.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Josh Allen's creativity and Jameis Winston's risk-taking produce statistical firsts in the NFL
item.description: Inside the Numbers dives into NFL statistics, streaks and trends each week. For more Inside the Numbers, head here. ___ Josh Allen and Jameis Winston delivered signature performances in prime time that define their styles of play.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Flames honor Johnny Gaudreau, welcome his family back to Calgary in emotional pre-game tribute
item.description: The Calgary Flames paid tribute to longtime star Johnny Gaudreau on Tuesday night before their game against the Columbus Blue Jackets, months after the All-Star was killed while biking on a New Jersey road this summer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Iowa State and SMU athletic directors in a 'stay off my lawn' moment regarding latest rankings
item.description: Athletic directors at Iowa State and SMU are in a turf war over the latest College Football Playoff rankings, leading to a “stay off my lawn" moment on social media. The background: SMU, at 11-1 and riding a nine-game winning streak into the Atlantic Coast Conference title game, was slotted at No.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Flames honor the late Johnny Gaudreau and welcome his family back to Calgary
item.description: CALGARY, Alberta (AP) — The Calgary Flames paid tribute to longtime star Johnny Gaudreau on Tuesday night before their game against the Columbus Blue Jackets, months after the All-Star was killed while biking on a New Jersey road this summer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Robbie Gould resigns as head football coach at Rolling Meadows High School
item.description: District 214 officials have announced the resignation of former Chicago Bears kicker and Rolling Meadows Mustangs head football coach, Gould, after a 5-5 season.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: A Rays move to Ybor City could still be possible
item.description: For months, the Tampa Bay Rays celebrated the signing of a deal between their group, the city of St. Petersburg, and the Pinellas County Commission.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah HC falls at home to Dallas, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Casey DeSmith made 34 saves for the Dallas Stars, who held on to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 2-1 at Delta Center on Monday. It was DeSmith's first win since Oct. 24.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Michigan seeking to play Northwestern at Soldier Field in 2025
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — College football season is over for Northwestern University, but that hasn't stopped higher-ups in the administration from weighing venue options for one of its high profile matchups in 2025. According to rg.org's Paul M.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 2024 PPR All 51 Team
item.description: 2024 PPR All 51 Team: Each season our selection committee recognizes the best players from across the county, assembling our "All 51" team. This list includes our first team picks, and honorable mentions.
item.dc:creator: Maddy Worley, Fox 5

item.title: Rays' leadership, Pinellas commission at odds over new stadium
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays' future in St. Petersburg remains in doubt, as team leadership and Pinellas County commissioners are at odds over the plans for a new stadium.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jaxson Stauber shuts out Vegas in season debut, 6-0
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Jaxson Stauber made 29 saves for his first NHL shutout, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vegas Golden Knights 6-0 at T-Mobile Arena on Saturday. It was Stauber’s debut for Utah, his seventh NHL game and his first since Feb. 22, 2023, with the Chicago Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Gus Malzahn is leaving UCF to become Florida State's offensive coordinator, AP source says
item.description: Gus Malzahn is resigning as Central Florida's head coach to become Florida State's offensive coordinator, a person familiar with the hire told The Associated Press on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Alabama A&M player Medrick Burnett Jr. dies following injury during game
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (WIAT) — Medrick Burnett Jr., a 20-year-old football player for Alabama A&M University, died Wednesday a month after sustaining a serious injury during a football game. Burnett Jr., a linebacker who was injured during the Magic City Classic on Oct.
item.dc:creator: Drew Taylor, WGN 9

item.title: Lions beat Bears 23-20 to extend win streak to 10 games
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Jared Goff threw two touchdown passes to Sam LaPorta, Jake Bates made three field goals in the first half and the Detroit Lions held off the Chicago Bears 23-20 on Thursday to extend their winning streak to 10 games. The Lions snapped a seven-game losing streak on Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago looks to break Boston's 6-game win streak
item.description: Boston Celtics (15-3, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (8-12, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago visits Minnesota after Hall's hat trick
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (8-12-2, in the Central Division) vs. Minnesota Wild (14-4-4, in the Central Division) Saint Paul, Minnesota; Friday, 2 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
